display_text: Gem of True Sight, Cost: 900: Permanent item that grants the carrier True Sight, revealing invisible units and wards to all allied vision within a 900 radius. Its active ability reveals a 300 radius area for 4 seconds, even through fog of war. Dropped on death but cannot be destroyed, making its retrieval a key objective. Stats: CD: 12s, Passive Radius: 900, Active Radius: 300, Duration: 4s.
